“Alright, that’s it.”

Before Lorraine could reach the knot of the cloth in her mouth, the young man grabbed her arm. He pulled both wrists together and bound them behind her head with something rope-like.

Even though she tried to tell him to stop, with the cloth gag in her mouth she couldn’t form any proper words. While Lorraine’s mind raced for a solution, the young man lowered his gaze slightly.

“Oh my, your nipples are already out, aren’t they?”

At his words, Lorraine remembered her current state and instinctively tried to cover her chest with her arms. Even with both hands bound, if she could just bring her arms forward, she could hide her breasts. But of course, the young man didn’t allow it.

“No, no. If you hide them, I won’t be able to help you.”

As Lorraine tried to swing her bound hands down from above her head, the young man stopped her with just his left hand. Her arms were now pinned above her head by his left hand, forced into a “banzai” pose, as if she were deliberately presenting her chest to him.

“It wouldn’t be fair to only do one side. Let’s bring this one out too, okay?”

Lorraine desperately resisted, but the young man used a single index finger on his right hand to pull her breast out from her bra.

“As expected… Lorraine-san’s breasts are the best…”

The young man stared intently at both of her breasts and gave his honest impression. Then, finally, his right hand reached out toward her chest.

He grabbed the breast that Lorraine had been rubbing earlier with his right hand, squeezing it slowly but firmly, then releasing it.

“Amazing… So much is coming out…”

But if that was the case, then the young man’s role wasn’t only that…

“I need to get milk out of this breast too, but first let me clean this one up.”

What the young man was looking at was the breast that was wet with milk. His face—and more specifically, his mouth—was right in front of the soaked breast. Lorraine immediately understood what he meant by “clean it up.”

The young man took the tip of her left breast into his mouth. Using his tongue, he licked and wiped away her breast milk. Naturally, every time his tongue touched her nipple, it provided even stronger stimulation, causing more milk to flow out. The pleasure from having her sensitive nipples stimulated made her waist buckle, and she collapsed onto the toilet seat.

“Oops, sorry. I should have said something with my mouth first, huh?”

Despite his actions, the occasional glimpses of the young man’s dignified and earnest nature confused Lorraine’s thoughts. Maybe it’s okay to just obediently listen to this boy… Such a thought even crossed her mind.

“There’s still some left, but this side is also quite full now, so I’ll have this one next.”

The young man brought his face close to her right nipple again. But this time he didn’t stop there.

“I’ll suck on this one from the start.”

Perhaps the restraint he had been holding back had finally broken. He took her right breast fully into his mouth, kneading it with his right hand while using his tongue to stimulate the nipple. Then, with the finishing touch, he sucked on it like a baby—actually, much stronger than a baby—drinking up her breast milk.

Every time his tongue rolled over her nipple, and every time he sucked strongly to drink the milk that came out, waves of pleasure assaulted Lorraine’s body at different timings. That pleasure further weakened her thoughts and strength. She hadn’t even noticed that the young man’s left hand was no longer holding her wrists and had moved to her chest.

He slowly massaged both of her breasts with both hands, licking up the milk that came out each time. “Aah… My dream is finally coming true…”

The young man began to thrust between Lorraine’s massive breasts. Although she could have resisted if she lowered her bound arms forward, she no longer had the strength left. Between her earlier resistance and the alcohol spreading through her body, she had become completely docile.

As her consciousness grew dimmer and she wondered what would happen next, she noticed a feminine silhouette behind the young man, who was absorbed in the paizuri, even though they were in a narrow stall.

Along with those words, a hand chop from Lorraine and an unknown woman struck the young man, and he fell into sleep.
